subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou dost witness and behold, from Thy most glorious Kingdom, my solitude and estrangement, my distress and affliction, my trials and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم تشاهد و تری من ملکوتک الابهی وحدتی و غربتی و کربتی و مصیبتی و بلائی و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
